note: Third run. All 32 staged items are dated Mon 2026-07-20; Sat 07-18 and Sun 07-19 returned nil across all ten domains, each established by positive evidence (date-archive 404s with resolving siblings on techafricanews/techcabal, listing ceilings at Fri 07-17 elsewhere) rather than inferred index lag. The weekday-publisher finding now holds across three consecutive weekends. Window end is deliberately set to 00:00Z on 07-20, not the run's wall-clock time: the sweep ran mid-day Monday, so anything published later that day must stay in scope for the next run rather than being cut off behind a mid-day high-water mark. The 48h floor would have caught it regardless; this makes it explicit.
